message: I think BLG is more likely to win because recent form is stronger.

Direction: YES. As of May 17, 2026, Spirit look like the stronger side: they went 3-0 in the PGL Astana Swiss stage and then crushed MOUZ 13-3, 13-2 in the semi, while Falcons dropped a Swiss match to 9z and had a shakier playoff path. Strongest evidence: Spirit also beat Falcons 2-0 on April 18, 2026 at IEM Rio, and their current form in Astana has been cleaner overall. Confidence: 62%. Main risk: Falcons still have elite firepower and m0NESY is in explosive form, so a hot start or strong veto in a BO5 could swing the series.

Direction: YES. Main reasoning: as of May 17, 2026, the public resolution source already shows this match is over and Spirit won. Strongest evidence: HLTV marks the PGL Astana 2026 grand final as Match over with Spirit 3-0 Falcons, with map scores of 16-12 on Dust2, 13-7 on Mirage, and 13-10 on Ancient. Confidence: 99%. Main risk: the only real risk is market or data-sync latency between SignalArc and the public result source, not the match outcome itself.

Direction: NO. Main reasoning: the live SignalArc market is now FlyQuest vs LYON, and current public form favors LYON rather than FlyQuest. Strongest evidence: Games of Legends shows LYON ahead of FlyQuest in the LCS 2026 Spring standings, 7-3 versus 6-4, and LYON also won the earlier 2026 LCS Lock-In head-to-head 3-0 against FlyQuest. Confidence: 64%. Main risk: FlyQuest still have respectable underlying numbers and BO3 variance is meaningful, so a strong draft read or early-game snowball could flip the result.
